prompt: A stunning cinematic photo of a futuristic glass office in Boston with harbor views at golden hour. On a sleek desk, a holographic AI assistant materializes from a glowing yin-yang symbol, helping a young entrepreneur manage multiple floating browser windows showing Gmail, LinkedIn, and calendar. Warm amber light with cool blue holographic accents. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8K.
method: solace-browser CDP automation → execCommand insertText → canvas.toDataURL extraction
